transcript.message: Thanks for calling Joe's Plumbing, this is an AI assistant. How can I help?
Hi, my kitchen sink is leaking.
Sorry to hear that. Can I get your name and number so we can schedule a visit?

analysis.transcript_summary: Caller reported a leaking kitchen sink; agent collected contact details.
